content.query:
requests
| where cloud_RoleName == "siege-api"
| summarize Requests = count(),
            p50 = percentile(duration, 50),
            p95 = percentile(duration, 95)
            by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Request volume + p50/p95 latency (siege-api)

content.query:
requests
| where cloud_RoleName == "siege-api"
| summarize Total = count(),
            Rate5xx = 100.0 * countif(toint(resultCode) >= 500) / count(),
            Rate4xx = 100.0 * countif(toint(resultCode) between (400 .. 499)) / count()
            by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: 5xx / 4xx rates (siege-api)

content.query:
exceptions
| where cloud_RoleName in ("siege-api", "siege-bot")
| summarize Count = count() by problemId, cloud_RoleName
| top 10 by Count desc
content.title: Top 10 exceptions

content.query:
traces
| where cloud_RoleName == "siege-bot"
| where message has "FastAPI HTTP sidecar instrumented"
| summarize Restarts = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Bot restart count

content.query:
requests
| where cloud_RoleName == "siege-api"
| where name has "generate-images"
| summarize p50 = percentile(duration, 50),
            p95 = percentile(duration, 95),
            Max = max(duration)
            by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Image generation duration

content.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "siege-api"
| where type == "postgresql"
| summarize p50 = percentile(duration, 50),
            p95 = percentile(duration, 95),
            Max = max(duration)
            by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Database query duration (siege-api → PostgreSQL)
